summary: Extraction fidelity is complete and non-blocking for this provenance repair. The repaired NCT04313634 locators use locator_type registry_record and point to retained section IDs in the sections.json artifact, with outcome/result locators anchored to posted-results-outcomes or adverse-events as appropriate.

findings.claim_or_issue: The repaired NCT04313634 provenance entries use locator_type registry_record rather than older module-only or prose-only locators.
findings.why_it_matters: The extraction rules require source-located provenance for extraction-grade registry records, and registry_record locators bind the record back to retained registry text.
findings.recommended_action: Continue using registry_record locators for retained ClinicalTrials.gov text-snapshot provenance.

findings.claim_or_issue: Outcome and result locators cite section:posted-results-outcomes for posted endpoint values and section:adverse-events for aggregate safety counts; the finding locator cites both retained sections.
findings.why_it_matters: Section-stable locators make the repaired provenance auditable against artifacts/sources/nct-04313634/snapshot-nct-04313634-clinicaltrials-v2-2026-06-21/sections.json.
findings.recommended_action: Use the retained section index as the audit source for future repairs to these registry-extracted records.
